description_long: This object is a military-style jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings, painted in a light gray color with red star insignias on the wings and tail. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a green-tinted canopy, suggesting an enclosed, single-seat configuration. The wings are low-mounted and sharply swept, with no visible winglets, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with some matte areas and visible panel lines. The overall design is reminiscent of Cold War-era Soviet jet fighters, built primarily from metal alloys.
description: A gray, swept-wing military jet airplane with red star insignias, a green-tinted cockpit canopy, and tricycle landing gear. The design is sleek and metallic, with a single vertical tail fin and low-mounted wings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, green cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with red star insignias.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the extended landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the right wing, tail fin, and the overall streamlined shape of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cockpit, nose, and the right wing with visible landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel, extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a green-tinted canopy.
